items.title: [正面] I have been reconnecting with different parts of m...
items.summary:
I have been reconnecting with different parts of myself — while also discovering others I did not even know could exist — and my goodness…

What a transcendent experience to come across something that so perfectly complements that kind of existential integration.

A sincere visual masterpiece, carried by beautiful Gothic tones and compelling storytelling.

The only truly devastating part is that this is a gacha game, which means I may have to step away from it far sooner than I would have hoped. 
💔
